name: Check that books from search result contain one or more entered latin letters or numeric in LYRASIS
fullName: Search libraries and books: Check that books from search result contain one or more entered latin letters or numeric in LYRASIS

steps.name: Then  Add library screen is opened
When  Add library "LYRASIS Reads" on Add library screen
And  Enter word 1 and save as 'info' on catalog books screen
Then  Books contain word 'info' on catalog books screen

labels.name: story
labels.value: Check that books from search result contain one or more entered latin letters or numeric in LYRASIS
